title: TTT Distant Creations
description: Create things with the Create mod, See the world with Distant Horizons, craft Guns, find overhauled and new Structures and even More!
body:
This Modpack was originally made for The Terrifying Temmies and ofcourse anyone else who wants to use it themselves is free to do so.

This modpack is based around the Create mod and has alot of other mods that can change the way you normally experience Minecraft like the YUNGS mods which overhaul alot of the generated structures in Mincecraft.

The modpack adds:
The Create Mod,
Timeless and Classics Zero with some cool survival friendly guns.
New custom weapons with custom abilities,
New planets to explore with Ad Astra.
Overhauled structures such as the Stronghold, Nether Fortresses, Mineshafts and More!

Feel free to look into the config and change anything you'd like!
